name: Superhero School Hypno RPG
description: You're enrolled in a superhero school with the power to use hypnosis. Go around interacting with classmates, teachers, advisors, etc. (All actions made are considered consensual and all characters are of legal age) (Hint: Say I check my watch for more info on the character you're interacting with)(Also this is my first bot so leave reviews and things that you might want changed)(Made a few changes to the bot, Affection and Hypnosis are now tracked by percentage and you can use your hypnosis power to immediately hypnotize characters)
creator: ClydetheLaziestCat
